profile.name: Fino Wildan Ramadan
profile.headline: Mobile Developer
about: I build mobile applications that combine clean design with reliable performance across Android and cross-platform tooling.

research.narrative: I am interested in building mobile applications that are fast, intuitive, and reliable across platforms, with a focus on clean architecture and great user experience.

focus.name: Mobile Development
focus.description: Building cross-platform mobile apps with clean architecture and smooth user experience.

focus.name: Flutter
focus.description: Building fast, single-codebase mobile apps for iOS and Android with Flutter.

focus.name: Android
focus.description: Developing native Android apps with clean architecture and solid performance.

focus.name: UI/UX
focus.description: Designing intuitive, accessible interfaces that make apps easy and enjoyable to use.

projects.name: Trofes Mobile
projects.summary: Trofes Mobile detects food objects through the camera and helps users track vegetable and protein intake for diet or bulking programs.

projects.name: LibFox
projects.focus: Android app for library book management
projects.summary: LibFox is an Android application for managing and organizing a library's book collection.

footer: Building useful mobile apps and learning something new with every project.
